case_title: SINGER ARLENE et al VS THE MORGAN COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,983.15 FILED BY SINGER ARLENE LEFF BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT THE MORGAN COMPANY AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF FEB-10-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE MORGAN COMPANY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGER ARLENE LEFF BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE MORGAN COMPANY $1,460.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,505.00, SERVICE NOT VALID ON DEFT AMERICAN BANKERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE MORGAN COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-20-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-15-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGER ARLENE LEFF BARBARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE MORGAN COMPANY AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
